basic_details.job_title: IIT Dharwad Sports Coaches Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Dharwad (IIT Dharwad)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Dharwad (IIT Dharwad) Sports Coaches Notification 2026 has been released on 15 May 2026 on the official website of IIT Dharwad. A total of 7 vacancies have been announced through the IIT Dharwad Sports Coaches Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years. Age relaxation will be as per the rules and regulations of IIT Dharwad.

qualification.education_qualification: NIS Diploma / Bachelor's degree in Physical Education (B.P.Ed) / Master's degree (M.P.Ed) / MS
qualification.details: Sports Coaches: NIS Diploma / Bachelor's degree in Physical Education (B.P.Ed) / Master's degree (M.P.Ed) / MS in Sports from a recognized university. Relevant coaching experience at University/State/National level. Participation at State/University level is mandatory. Proven track record of producing medal winners is preferred.

salary_details.details: Senior Coach: Rs. 45,000/- to 50,000/- per month (consolidated) or Rs. 513/- per hour (part-time) Coach: Rs. 40,000/- to 45,000/- per month (consolidated) or Rs. 449/- per hour (part-time) Junior Coach: Rs. 35,000/- to 40,000/- per month (consolidated) or Rs. 385/- per hour (part-time)

selection_process: Skill Test Interview Any other mode as decided by the Institute
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Dharwad Sports Coaches Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 05-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Dharwad to complete the application.
